Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ MemberDefImpl() [1/2]

MemberDefImpl::MemberDefImpl ( const QCString &  df,
int  dl,
int  dc,
const QCString &  t,
const QCString &  na,
const QCString &  a,
const QCString &  e,
Protection  p,
Specifier  v,
bool  s,
Relationship  r,
MemberType  mt,
const ArgumentList &  tal,
const ArgumentList &  al,
const QCString &  meta 
)

Creates a new member definition.

Parameters
dfFile containing the definition of this member.
dlLine at which the member definition was found.
dcColumn at which the member definition was found.
tA string representing the type of the member.
naA string representing the name of the member.
aA string representing the arguments of the member.
eA string representing the throw clause of the members.
pThe protection context of the member, possible values are: Public, Protected, Private.
vThe degree of 'virtualness' of the member, possible values are: Normal, Virtual, Pure.
sA boolean that is true iff the member is static.
rThe relationship between the class and the member.
mtThe kind of member. See MemberType for a list of all types.
talThe template arguments of this member.
alThe arguments of this member. This is a structured form of the string past as argument a.
metaSlice metadata.

4523 else

1738 {

1749 return;
1750 }
1751 if (!groupDef && classDef && !classDef->isLinkableInProject())
1752 {
1753 //printf("in a class but class not linkable!\n");
1754 m_isLinkableCached = 1; // in class but class not linkable
1755 return;
1756 }
1757 const NamespaceDef *nspace = getNamespaceDef();
1758 const FileDef *fileDef = getFileDef();

1760 && (fileDef==0 || !fileDef->isLinkableInProject()))
1761 {
1762 //printf("in a namespace but namespace not linkable!\n");
1763 m_isLinkableCached = 1; // in namespace but namespace not linkable
1764 return;
1765 }
1766 if (!groupDef && !nspace &&
1767 m_related==Relationship::Member && !classDef &&
1768 fileDef && !fileDef->isLinkableInProject())
1769 {
1770 //printf("in a file but file not linkable!\n");
1771 m_isLinkableCached = 1; // in file (and not in namespace) but file not linkable
1772 return;
1773 }
1774 if ((!protectionLevelVisible(m_prot) && m_mtype!=MemberType_Friend) &&
1775 !(m_prot==Protection::Private && (m_virt!=Specifier::Normal || isOverride() || isFinal()) && extractPrivateVirtual))
1776 {
1777 //printf("private and invisible!\n");
1778 m_isLinkableCached = 1; // hidden due to protection
1779 return;
1780 }
1781 if (m_stat && classDef==0 && !extractStatic)
1782 {
1783 //printf("static and invisible!\n");
1784 m_isLinkableCached = 1; // hidden due to staticness
1785 return;
1786 }
1787 //printf("linkable!\n");
1788 return; // linkable!

4031 //printf("%s:hasDocumentedParams=TRUE;\n",qPrint(name()));

4034 else if (!m_hasDocumentedParams)
4035 {
4036 const ArgumentList &al = argumentList();
4037 const ArgumentList &declAl = declArgumentList();
4038 bool allDoc=TRUE; // no parameter => all parameters are documented
4039 if ( // member has parameters
4040 al.hasParameters() // with at least one parameter (that is not void)
4041 )
4042 {
4043 // see if all parameters have documentation
4044 for (auto it = al.begin(); it!=al.end() && allDoc; ++it)
4045 {
4046 Argument a = *it;
4047 if (!a.name.isEmpty() && a.type!="void" &&
4048 !(isPython && (a.name=="self" || a.name=="cls"))
4049 )

4051 allDoc = !a.docs.isEmpty();
4052 }

4055 }

4057 {
4058 allDoc=TRUE;
4059 for (auto it = al.begin(); it!=al.end() && allDoc; ++it)
4060 {
4061 Argument a = *it;
4062 if (!a.name.isEmpty() && a.type!="void" &&

4067 }

4070 }
4071 }
4072 if (allDoc)
4073 {

4075 m_hasDocumentedParams = TRUE;

2723 // write the member specifier list
2724 //ol.writeLatexSpacing();
2725 //ol.startTypewriter();
2726 //ol.docify(" [");
2727 SrcLangExt lang = getLanguage();
2728 bool optVhdl = lang==SrcLangExt_VHDL;
2729 bool extractPrivate = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIVATE);
2730 if (optVhdl)
2731 {
2732 sl.push_back(theTranslator->trVhdlType(getMemberSpecifiers(),TRUE).str());
2733 }
2734 else
2735 {
2736 if (isFriend()) sl.push_back("friend");
2737 else if (isRelated()) sl.push_back("related");
2738 else
2739 {
2740 if (isExternal()) sl.push_back("extern");
2741 if (inlineInfo && isInline()) sl.push_back("inline");
2742 if (isExplicit()) sl.push_back("explicit");
2743 if (isMutable()) sl.push_back("mutable");
2744 if (isStatic()) sl.push_back("static");
2745 if (isGettable()) sl.push_back("get");
2746 if (isProtectedGettable()) sl.push_back("protected get");
2747 if (isSettable()) sl.push_back("set");
2748 if (isProtectedSettable()) sl.push_back("protected set");
2749 if (extractPrivate)
2750 {
2751 if (isPrivateGettable()) sl.push_back("private get");
2752 if (isPrivateSettable()) sl.push_back("private set");
2753 }
2754 if (isConstExpr()) sl.push_back("constexpr");
2755 if (isAddable()) sl.push_back("add");
2756 if (!isUNOProperty() && isRemovable()) sl.push_back("remove");
2757 if (isRaisable()) sl.push_back("raise");
2758 if (isReadable()) sl.push_back("read");
2759 if (isWritable()) sl.push_back("write");
2760 if (isFinal()) sl.push_back("final");
2761 if (isAbstract()) sl.push_back("abstract");
2762 if (isOverride()) sl.push_back("override");
2763 if (isInitonly()) sl.push_back("initonly");
2764 if (isSealed()) sl.push_back("sealed");
2765 if (isNew()) sl.push_back("new");
2766 if (isOptional()) sl.push_back("optional");
2767 if (isRequired()) sl.push_back("required");
2768
2769 if (isNonAtomic()) sl.push_back("nonatomic");
2770 else if (isObjCProperty()) sl.push_back("atomic");
2771
2772 // mutual exclusive Objective 2.0 property attributes
2773 if (isAssign()) sl.push_back("assign");
2774 else if (isCopy()) sl.push_back("copy");
2775 else if (isRetain()) sl.push_back("retain");
2776 else if (isWeak()) sl.push_back("weak");
2777 else if (lang!=SrcLangExt_CSharp && isStrong()) sl.push_back("strong");
2778 else if (isUnretained()) sl.push_back("unsafe_unretained");
2779
2780 if (!isObjCMethod())
2781 {
2782 if (protection()==Protection::Protected) sl.push_back("protected");
2783 else if (protection()==Protection::Private) sl.push_back("private");
2784 else if (protection()==Protection::Package) sl.push_back("package");
2785
2786 if (lvirt==Specifier::Virtual) sl.push_back("virtual");
2787 else if (lvirt==Specifier::Pure) sl.push_back("pure virtual");
2788 if (isSignal()) sl.push_back("signal");
2789 if (isSlot()) sl.push_back("slot");
2790 if (isDefault()) sl.push_back("default");
2791 if (isDelete()) sl.push_back("delete");
2792 if (isNoExcept()) sl.push_back("noexcept");
2793 if (isAttribute()) sl.push_back("attribute");
2794 if (isUNOProperty()) sl.push_back("property");
2795 if (isReadonly()) sl.push_back("readonly");
2796 if (isBound()) sl.push_back("bound");
2797 if (isUNOProperty() && isRemovable()) sl.push_back("removable");
2798 if (isConstrained()) sl.push_back("constrained");
2799 if (isTransient()) sl.push_back("transient");
2800 if (isMaybeVoid()) sl.push_back("maybevoid");
2801 if (isMaybeDefault()) sl.push_back("maybedefault");
2802 if (isMaybeAmbiguous()) sl.push_back("maybeambiguous");
2803 if (isPublished()) sl.push_back("published"); // enum
2804 }
2805 if (isObjCProperty() && isImplementation())
2806 {
2807 sl.push_back("implementation");
2808 }
2809 }
2810 if (getClassDef() &&
2811 container->definitionType()==TypeClass &&
2812 getClassDef()!=container &&
2813 !isRelated()
2814 )
2815 {
2816 sl.push_back("inherited");
2817 }
2818 }
2819 }
2820 else if (isObjCMethod() && isImplementation())
2821 {
2822 sl.push_back("implementation");
2823 }
2824
2825 for (const auto &sx : m_qualifiers)
2826 {
2827 bool alreadyAdded = std::find(sl.begin(), sl.end(), sx) != sl.end();
2828 if (!alreadyAdded)
2829 {
2830 sl.push_back(sx);
2831 }
2832 }
2833
2834 return sl;
2835}

2588 {
2589 bool extractAll = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_ALL);
2590 bool alwaysDetailedSec = Config_getBool(ALWAYS_DETAILED_SEC);
2591 bool repeatBrief = Config_getBool(REPEAT_BRIEF);
2592 bool briefMemberDesc = Config_getBool(BRIEF_MEMBER_DESC);
2593 bool hideUndocMembers = Config_getBool(HIDE_UNDOC_MEMBERS);
2594 bool extractStatic = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_STATIC);
2595 bool extractPrivateVirtual = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIV_VIRTUAL);
2596 bool inlineSources = Config_getBool(INLINE_SOURCES);
2597
2598 // the member has detailed documentation because the user added some comments
2599 bool docFilter =
2600 // extract all is enabled
2601 extractAll ||
2602 // has detailed docs
2603 !documentation().isEmpty() ||
2604 // has inbody docs
2605 !inbodyDocumentation().isEmpty() ||
2606 // is an enum with values that are documented
2607 (isEnumerate() && hasDocumentedEnumValues()) ||
2608 // is documented enum value
2609 (m_mtype==MemberType_EnumValue && !briefDescription().isEmpty()) ||
2610 // has brief description that is part of the detailed description
2611 (!briefDescription().isEmpty() && // has brief docs
2612 (alwaysDetailedSec && // they are visible in
2613 (repeatBrief || // detailed section or
2614 !briefMemberDesc // they are explicitly not
2615 ) // shown in brief section
2616 )
2617 ) ||
2618 // has one or more documented arguments
2619 (m_templateMaster ?
2620 m_templateMaster->argumentList().hasDocumentation() :
2621 m_defArgList.hasDocumentation());
2622
2623 // generate function guard
2624 // ================== =======
2625 // _writeGroupInclude -> ignored in calculation
2626 // multiLineInitializer() -> hasMultiLineInitializer()
2627 // _writeReimplements -> _isReimplements()
2628 // _writeReimplementedBy -> _countReimplementedBy()>0
2629 // _writeExamples -> hasExamples()
2630 // _writeTypeConstraints -> m_typeConstraints.hasParameters()
2631 // writeSourceDef -> !getSourceFileBase().isEmpty();
2632 // writeInlineCode -> INLINE_SOURCES && hasSources()
2633 // writeSourceRefs -> hasReferencesRelation() && hasSourceRefs()
2634 // writeSourceReffedBy -> hasReferencedByRelation() && hasSourceReffedBy()
2635 // _writeCallGraph -> _hasVisibleCallGraph()
2636 // _writeCallerGraph -> _hasVisibleCallerGraph()
2637
2638 // the member has detailed documentation because there is some generated info
2639 bool docInfo =
2640 // has a multi-line initialization block
2641 (hasMultiLineInitializer()) ||
2642 // reimplements / reimplemented by
2643 _isReimplements() || (_countReimplementedBy() > 0) ||
2644 // examples
2645 hasExamples() ||
2646 // type constraints
2647 m_typeConstraints.hasParameters() ||
2648 // has source definition
2649 !getSourceFileBase().isEmpty() ||
2650 // has inline sources
2651 (inlineSources && hasSources()) ||
2652 // has references
2653 (hasReferencesRelation() && hasSourceRefs()) ||
2654 (hasReferencedByRelation() && hasSourceReffedBy()) ||
2655 // call graph
2656 _hasVisibleCallGraph() ||
2657 // caller graph
2658 _hasVisibleCallerGraph();
2659
2660 if (!hideUndocMembers) // if HIDE_UNDOC_MEMBERS is NO we also show the detailed section
2661 // if there is only some generated info
2662 {
2663 docFilter = docFilter || docInfo;
2664 }
2665
2666 // this is not a global static or global statics should be extracted
2667 bool staticFilter = getClassDef()!=0 || !isStatic() || extractStatic;
2668
2669 // only include members that are non-private unless EXTRACT_PRIVATE is
2670 // set to YES or the member is part of a group
2671 bool privateFilter = protectionLevelVisible(protection()) || m_mtype==MemberType_Friend ||
2672 (m_prot==Protection::Private && (m_virt!=Specifier::Normal || isOverride() || isFinal()) && extractPrivateVirtual);
2673
2674 // hide friend (class|struct|union) member if HIDE_FRIEND_COMPOUNDS
2675 // is true
2676 bool friendCompoundFilter = !(Config_getBool(HIDE_FRIEND_COMPOUNDS) && isFriend());
2677
2678 m_detailedDescriptionCachedValue =
2679 (docFilter && staticFilter && privateFilter && friendCompoundFilter && !isHidden());
2680 //printf("docFilter=%d docInfo=%d staticFilter=%d privateFilter=%d friendCompoundFilter=%d !isHidden()=%d",
2681 // docFilter,docInfo,staticFilter,privateFilter,friendCompoundFilter,!isHidden());
2682 m_hasDetailedDescriptionCached = true;
2683 }
2684 //printf("<hasDetailedDescription(cached=%d)\n",m_hasDetailedDescriptionCached);
2685 return m_detailedDescriptionCachedValue;

2265 ol.startMemberItem(anchor(),anonType,inheritId);
2266 int j;
2267 for (j=0;j< indentLevel;j++)
2268 {
2269 ol.writeNonBreakableSpace(3);
2270 }
2271 QCString varName=ltype.right(ltype.length()-ir).stripWhiteSpace();
2272 //printf(">>>>>> ltype='%s' varName='%s'\n",qPrint(ltype),qPrint(varName));
2273 ol.docify("}");
2274 if (varName.isEmpty() && isAnonymous())
2275 {
2276 ol.docify(";");
2277 }
2278 else if (!varName.isEmpty() && (varName.at(0)=='*' || varName.at(0)=='&'))
2279 {
2280 ol.docify(" ");
2281 ol.docify(varName);
2282 }
2283 endAnonScopeNeeded=TRUE;
2284 }
2285 else
2286 {
2287 if (getAnonymousEnumType()) // type is an anonymous enum
2288 {
2289 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol), // out
2290 d, // scope
2291 getBodyDef(), // fileScope
2292 this, // self
2293 ltype.left(i), // text
2294 FALSE // autoBreak
2295 );
2296 getAnonymousEnumType()->writeEnumDeclaration(ol,cd,nd,fd,gd);
2297 //ol+=*getAnonymousEnumType()->enumDecl();
2298 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),d,getFileDef(),this,ltype.right(ltype.length()-i-l),TRUE);
2299 }
2300 else
2301 {
2302 ltype = ltype.left(i) + " { ... } " + removeAnonymousScopes(ltype.right(ltype.length()-i-l));
2303 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol), // out
2304 d, // scope
2305 getBodyDef(), // fileScope
2306 this, // self
2307 ltype, // text
2308 FALSE // autoBreak
2309 );
2310 }
2311 }
2312 }
2313 else if (ltype=="@") // rename type from enum values
2314 {
2315 ltype="";
2316 }
2317 else
2318 {
2319 if (isObjCMethod())
2320 {
2321 ltype.prepend("(");
2322 ltype.append(")");
2323 }
2324 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol), // out
2325 d, // scope
2326 getBodyDef(), // fileScope
2327 this, // self
2328 ltype, // text
2329 FALSE // autoBreak
2330 );
2331 }
2332 bool htmlOn = ol.isEnabled(OutputType::Html);
2333 if (htmlOn && !ltype.isEmpty())
2334 {
2335 ol.disable(OutputType::Html);
2336 }
2337 if (!ltype.isEmpty()) ol.docify(" ");
2338 if (htmlOn)
2339 {
2340 ol.enable(OutputType::Html);
2341 }
2342
2343 if (m_annMemb)
2344 {
2345 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2346 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Html);
2347 ol.writeNonBreakableSpace(3);
2348 ol.popGeneratorState();
2349 }
2350 else
2351 {
2352 ol.insertMemberAlign(m_tArgList.hasParameters());
2353 }
2354
2355 // *** write name
2356 if (!isAnonymous() && !_isAnonymousBitField()) // hide anonymous stuff
2357 {
2358 bool extractPrivateVirtual = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIV_VIRTUAL);
2359 bool extractStatic = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_STATIC);
2360 MemberDefMutable *annMemb = toMemberDefMutable(m_annMemb);
2361 bool visibleIfPrivate = (protectionLevelVisible(protection()) ||
2362 m_mtype==MemberType_Friend ||
2363 (m_prot==Protection::Private &&
2364 (m_virt!=Specifier::Normal || isOverride() || isFinal()) &&
2365 extractPrivateVirtual && hasDocumentation()
2366 ));
2367 //printf("Member name=`%s gd=%p md->groupDef=%p inGroup=%d isLinkable()=%d hasDocumentation=%d\n",qPrint(name()),gd,getGroupDef(),inGroup,isLinkable(),hasDocumentation());
2368 if (!name().isEmpty() && // name valid
2369 (hasDetailedDescription() || isReference()) && // has docs
2370 visibleIfPrivate &&
2371 !(isStatic() && getClassDef()==0 && !extractStatic) // hidden due to static-ness
2372 )
2373 {
2374 if (annMemb)
2375 {
2376 //printf("anchor=%s ann_anchor=%s\n",anchor(),annMemb->anchor());
2377 annMemb->writeLink(ol,
2378 annMemb->getClassDef(),
2379 annMemb->getNamespaceDef(),
2380 annMemb->getFileDef(),
2381 annMemb->getGroupDef());
2382 }
2383 else
2384 {
2385 //printf("writeLink %s->%d\n",qPrint(name),hasDocumentation());
2386 const ClassDef *rcd = cd;
2387 if (isReference() && getClassDef()) rcd = getClassDef();
2388 writeLink(ol,rcd,nd,fd,gd);
2389 }
2390 }
2391 else if (isDocumentedFriendClass())
2392 // if the member is an undocumented friend declaration for some class,
2393 // then maybe we can link to the class
2394 {
2395 writeLink(ol,getClass(name()),0,0,0);
2396 }
2397 else
2398 // there is a brief member description and brief member
2399 // descriptions are enabled or there is no detailed description.
2400 {
2401 const ClassDef *rcd = cd;
2402 if (isReference() && getClassDef()) rcd = getClassDef();
2403 writeLink(ol,rcd,nd,fd,gd,TRUE);
2404 }
2405 }
2406
2407 // *** write arguments
2408 if (!argsString().isEmpty() && !isObjCMethod())
2409 {
2410 if (!isDefine() && !isTypedef()) ol.writeString(" ");
2411 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol), // out
2412 d, // scope
2413 getBodyDef(), // fileScope
2414 this, // self
2415 isDefine() ?
2416 substitute(argsString(),",",", ") :
2417 isTypedef() ?
2418 substitute(argsString(),")(",") (") :
2419 combineArgsAndException(argsString(),excpString()), // text
2420 m_annMemb!=0, // autoBreak
2421 TRUE, // external
2422 FALSE, // keepSpaces
2423 indentLevel
2424 );
2425 }
2426
2427 // *** write bitfields
2428 if (!m_bitfields.isEmpty()) // add bitfields
2429 {
2430 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),d,getBodyDef(),this,m_bitfields);
2431 }
2432 else if (hasOneLineInitializer()
2433 //!init.isEmpty() && initLines==0 && // one line initializer
2434 //((maxInitLines>0 && userInitLines==-1) || userInitLines>0) // enabled by default or explicitly
2435 ) // add initializer
2436 {
2437 if (!isDefine())
2438 {
2439 //ol.writeString(" = ");
2440 ol.writeString(" ");
2441 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),d,getBodyDef(),this,m_initializer.simplifyWhiteSpace());
2442 }
2443 else
2444 {
2445 ol.writeNonBreakableSpace(3);
2446 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),d,getBodyDef(),this,m_initializer);
2447 }
2448 }
2449 else if (isTypeAlias()) // using template alias
2450 {
2451 ol.writeString(" = ");
2452 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),d,getBodyDef(),this,m_type);
2453 }
2454
2455
2456 if ((isObjCMethod() || isObjCProperty()) && isImplementation())
2457 {
2458 ol.startTypewriter();
2459 ol.docify(" [implementation]");
2460 ol.endTypewriter();
2461 }
2462
2463 bool extractPrivate = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIVATE);
2464
2465 if (isProperty() && (isSettable() || isGettable() ||
2466 isPrivateSettable() || isPrivateGettable() ||
2467 isProtectedSettable() || isProtectedGettable()))
2468 {
2469 ol.writeLatexSpacing();
2470 ol.startTypewriter();
2471 ol.docify(" [");
2472 StringVector sl;
2473
2474 if (isGettable()) sl.push_back("get");
2475 if (isProtectedGettable()) sl.push_back("protected get");
2476 if (isSettable()) sl.push_back("set");
2477 if (isProtectedSettable()) sl.push_back("protected set");
2478 if (extractPrivate)
2479 {
2480 if (isPrivateGettable()) sl.push_back("private get");
2481 if (isPrivateSettable()) sl.push_back("private set");
2482 }
2483 bool first=true;
2484 for (const auto &s : sl)
2485 {
2486 if (!first)
2487 {
2488 ol.docify(", ");
2489 }
2490 first=false;
2491 ol.docify(s.c_str());
2492 }
2493 ol.docify("]");
2494 ol.endTypewriter();
2495 }
2496
2497 if (isEvent() && (isAddable() || isRemovable() || isRaisable()))
2498 {
2499 ol.writeLatexSpacing();
2500 ol.startTypewriter();
2501 ol.docify(" [");
2502 StringVector sl;
2503 if (isAddable()) sl.push_back("add");
2504 if (isRemovable()) sl.push_back("remove");
2505 if (isRaisable()) sl.push_back("raise");
2506 bool first=true;
2507 for (const auto &s : sl)
2508 {
2509 if (!first)
2510 {
2511 ol.docify(", ");
2512 }
2513 first=false;
2514 ol.docify(s.c_str());
2515 }
2516 ol.docify("]");
2517 ol.endTypewriter();
2518 }
2519
2520 if (writeAnchor)
2521 {
2522 ol.endDoxyAnchor(cfname,anchor());
2523 }
2524
2525 //printf("endMember %s annoClassDef=%p annEnumType=%p\n",
2526 // qPrint(name()),annoClassDef,annEnumType);
2527 ol.endMemberItem(anonType);
2528 if (endAnonScopeNeeded)
2529 {
2530 ol.endAnonTypeScope(indentLevel);
2531 }
2532
2533 // write brief description
2534 if (!briefDescription().isEmpty() &&
2535 Config_getBool(BRIEF_MEMBER_DESC)
2536 )
2537 {
2538 auto parser { createDocParser() };
2539 auto ast { validatingParseDoc(*parser.get(),
2540 briefFile(),briefLine(),
2541 getOuterScope()?getOuterScope():d,
2542 this,briefDescription(),TRUE,FALSE,
2543 QCString(),TRUE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT)) };
2544 if (!ast->isEmpty())
2545 {
2546 ol.startMemberDescription(anchor(),inheritId);
2547 ol.writeDoc(ast.get(),getOuterScope()?getOuterScope():d,this);
2548 if (detailsVisible) // add More.. link only when both brief and details are visible
2549 {
2550 if (!isAnonymous()) // hide anonymous stuff
2551 {
2552 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2553 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Html);
2554 ol.docify(" ");
2555 MemberDefMutable *annMemb = toMemberDefMutable(m_annMemb);
2556 if (annMemb)
2557 {
2558 ol.startTextLink(annMemb->getOutputFileBase(),annMemb->anchor());
2559 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trMore());
2560 ol.endTextLink();
2561 }
2562 ol.popGeneratorState();
2563 }
2564 }
2565 // for RTF we need to add an extra empty paragraph
2566 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2567 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::RTF);
2568 ol.startParagraph();
2569 ol.endParagraph();
2570 ol.popGeneratorState();
2571 ol.endMemberDescription();
2572 }
2573 }
2574
2575 ol.endMemberDeclaration(anchor(),inheritId);
2576
2577 warnIfUndocumented();
2578 //printf("< %s MemberDefImpl::writeDeclaration() inGroup=%d\n",qPrint(qualifiedName()),inGroup);
2579}

◆ writeDocumentation()

void MemberDefImpl::writeDocumentation ( const MemberList *  ml,
int  memCount,
int  memTotal,
OutputList &  ol,
const QCString &  scName,
const Definition *  container,
bool  inGroup,
bool  showEnumValues = FALSE,
bool  showInline = FALSE 
) const
virtual

Writes the "detailed documentation" section of this member to all active output formats.

Implements MemberDefMutable.

3355 QCString cname = container->name();

3379 }
3380 else
3381 {

3392 }

3395 {
3396 if (ldef.at(0)=='@')
3397 {
3398 ldef=ldef.mid(2);

3402 {
3403 title += "()";

3417
3418 ol.pushGeneratorState();

3427 {

3429 bool found=false;
3430 for (const auto &vmd : *ml)
3431 {

3435 ol.startMemberDoc(ciname,name(),memAnchor,name(),memCount,memTotal,showInline);

3442 found=true;

3445 }
3446 if (!found) // anonymous compound
3447 {

3451 ol.startDoxyAnchor(cfname,cname,memAnchor,doxyName,doxyArgs);
3452 ol.startMemberDoc(ciname,name(),memAnchor,"["+typeName+"]",memCount,memTotal,showInline);

3454

3457 {
3458 std::string prefix = match.prefix().str();

3468 }
3469 }
3470 else // not an enum value or anonymous compound
3471 {

3473 ol.startMemberDoc(ciname,name(),memAnchor,title,memCount,memTotal,showInline);
3474

3478 ol.docify(m_metaData);
3479 ol.endMemberDocPrefixItem();
3480 }
3481
3482 const ClassDef *cd=getClassDef();

3488 for (const ArgumentList &tal : m_defTmpArgLists)
3489 {
3490 if (!tal.empty())
3491 {
3492 if (!first) ol.docify(" ");
3493 ol.startMemberDocPrefixItem();
3494 _writeTemplatePrefix(ol,scopedContainer,tal);
3495 ol.endMemberDocPrefixItem();
3496 }
3497 }
3498 }
3499 else // definition gets it template parameters from its class
3500 // (since no definition was found)
3501 {
3502 if (cd && lang==SrcLangExt_Cpp && !isTemplateSpecialization())
3503 {
3504 for (const ArgumentList &tal : cd->getTemplateParameterLists())
3505 {
3506 if (!tal.empty())
3507 {
3508 if (!first) ol.docify(" ");
3509 ol.startMemberDocPrefixItem();
3510 _writeTemplatePrefix(ol,scopedContainer,tal,false);
3511 ol.endMemberDocPrefixItem();
3512 }
3513 }
3514 }
3515 if (m_tArgList.hasParameters() && lang==SrcLangExt_Cpp) // function template prefix
3516 {
3517 ol.startMemberDocPrefixItem();
3518 _writeTemplatePrefix(ol,scopedContainer,m_tArgList);
3519 ol.endMemberDocPrefixItem();
3520 }
3521 }
3522
3523 if (!sl.empty())
3524 {
3525 ol.pushGeneratorState();
3526 ol.disableAll();
3527 ol.enable(OutputType::Html);
3528 ol.writeString("<table class=\"mlabels\">\n");
3529 ol.writeString(" <tr>\n");
3530 ol.writeString(" <td class=\"mlabels-left\">\n");
3531 ol.popGeneratorState();
3532 htmlEndLabelTable=TRUE;
3533 }
3534
3535 ol.startMemberDocName(isObjCMethod());
3536 if (cd && cd->isObjectiveC())
3537 {
3538 // strip scope name
3539 int ep = ldef.find("::");
3540 if (ep!=-1)
3541 {
3542 int sp=ldef.findRev(' ',ep);
3543 if (sp!=-1)
3544 {
3545 ldef=ldef.left(sp+1)+ldef.mid(ep+2);
3546 } else {
3547 ldef=ldef.mid(ep+2);
3548 }
3549 }
3550 // strip keywords
3551 int dp = ldef.find(':');
3552 if (dp!=-1)
3553 {
3554 ldef=ldef.left(dp+1);
3555 }
3556 int dl=ldef.length();
3557 //printf("start >%s<\n",qPrint(ldef));
3558 int i=dl-1;
3559 while (i>=0 && (isId(ldef.at(i)) || ldef.at(i)==':')) i--;
3560 while (i>=0 && isspace(static_cast<uint8_t>(ldef.at(i)))) i--;
3561 if (i>0)
3562 {
3563 // insert branches around the type
3564 ldef="("+ldef.left(i+1)+")"+ldef.mid(i+1);
3565 }
3566 //printf("end >%s< i=%d\n",qPrint(ldef),i);
3567 if (isStatic()) ldef.prepend("+ "); else ldef.prepend("- ");
3568 }
3569
3570 if (optVhdl)
3571 {
3572 hasParameterList=VhdlDocGen::writeVHDLTypeDocumentation(this,scopedContainer,ol);
3573 }
3574 else if (lang==SrcLangExt_Slice)
3575 {
3576 // Eliminate the self-reference.
3577 int pos = ldef.findRev(' ');
3578 if (pos<0) pos=0;
3579 if (pos>0)
3580 {
3581 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),
3582 scopedContainer,
3583 getBodyDef(),
3584 this,
3585 ldef.left(pos)
3586 );
3587 }
3588 ol.docify(ldef.mid(pos));
3589 const Definition *scope = cd;
3590 if (scope==0) scope = nd;
3591 hasParameterList=writeDefArgumentList(ol,scope,this);
3592 }
3593 else
3594 {
3595 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),
3596 scopedContainer,
3597 getBodyDef(),
3598 this,
3599 substitute(ldef,"::",sep)
3600 );
3601 const Definition *scope = cd;
3602 if (scope==0) scope = nd;
3603 hasParameterList=writeDefArgumentList(ol,scope,this);
3604 }
3605
3606 if (hasOneLineInitializer()) // add initializer
3607 {
3608 if (!isDefine())
3609 {
3610 //ol.docify(" = ");
3611 ol.docify(" ");
3612 QCString init = m_initializer.simplifyWhiteSpace();
3613 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),scopedContainer,getBodyDef(),this,init);
3614 }
3615 else
3616 {
3617 ol.writeNonBreakableSpace(3);
3618 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),scopedContainer,getBodyDef(),this,m_initializer);
3619 }
3620 }
3621 if (!excpString().isEmpty()) // add exception list
3622 {
3623 writeExceptionList(ol,cd,this);
3624 hasParameterList=true; // call endParameterList below
3625 }
3626 }
3627
3628 ol.pushGeneratorState();
3629 ol.disable(OutputType::Html);
3630 if (!sl.empty())
3631 {
3632 ol.startLabels();
3633 size_t count=0;
3634 for (const auto &s : sl)
3635 {
3636 count++;
3637 ol.writeLabel(s.c_str(),count==sl.size());
3638 }
3639 ol.endLabels();
3640 }
3641 ol.popGeneratorState();
3642
3643 if (hasParameterList)
3644 {
3645 ol.endParameterList();
3646 ol.endMemberDoc(TRUE);
3647 }
3648 else
3649 {
3650 ol.endMemberDocName();
3651 ol.endMemberDoc(FALSE);
3652 }
3653
3654 // for HTML write the labels here
3655 ol.pushGeneratorState();
3656 ol.disableAll();
3657 ol.enable(OutputType::Html);
3658 if (htmlEndLabelTable)
3659 {
3660 ol.writeString(" </td>\n");
3661 ol.writeString(" <td class=\"mlabels-right\">\n");
3662 ol.startLabels();
3663 size_t count=0;
3664 for (const auto &s : sl)
3665 {
3666 count++;
3667 ol.writeLabel(s.c_str(),count==sl.size());
3668 }
3669 ol.endLabels();
3670 ol.writeString(" </td>\n");
3671 ol.writeString(" </tr>\n");
3672 ol.writeString("</table>\n");
3673 }
3674 ol.writeString("</div>");
3675 ol.popGeneratorState();
3676
3677
3678 ol.endDoxyAnchor(cfname,memAnchor);
3679 ol.startIndent();
3680
3681 _writeGroupInclude(ol,inGroup);
3682
3683 /* write multi-line initializer (if any) */
3684 if (hasMultiLineInitializer()) _writeMultiLineInitializer(ol,scopeName);
3685
3686 /* write brief description */
3687 QCString brief = briefDescription();
3688 if (!brief.isEmpty() &&
3689 (Config_getBool(REPEAT_BRIEF) ||
3690 !Config_getBool(BRIEF_MEMBER_DESC)
3691 )
3692 )
3693 {
3694 ol.startParagraph();
3695 ol.generateDoc(briefFile(),briefLine(),
3696 scopedContainer,this,
3697 brief,FALSE,FALSE,
3698 QCString(),TRUE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT));
3699 ol.endParagraph();
3700 }
3701
3702 /* write detailed description */
3703 QCString detailed = documentation();
3704 if (!detailed.isEmpty() ||
3705 !inbodyDocumentation().isEmpty())
3706 {
3707 // write vhdl inline code with or without option INLINE_SOURCE
3708 if (optVhdl && VhdlDocGen::isMisc(this))
3709 {
3710 VhdlDocGen::writeSource(this,ol,cname);
3711 return;
3712 }
3713 else
3714 {
3715 ol.generateDoc(docFile(),docLine(),scopedContainer,this,detailed+"\n",TRUE,FALSE,
3716 QCString(),FALSE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT));
3717 }
3718
3719 if (!inbodyDocumentation().isEmpty())
3720 {
3721 ol.generateDoc(inbodyFile(),inbodyLine(),
3722 scopedContainer,this,
3723 inbodyDocumentation()+"\n",TRUE,FALSE,
3724 QCString(),FALSE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT));
3725 }
3726 }
3727 else if (!brief.isEmpty() && (Config_getBool(REPEAT_BRIEF) || !Config_getBool(BRIEF_MEMBER_DESC)))
3728 {
3729 if (!inbodyDocumentation().isEmpty())
3730 {
3731 ol.generateDoc(inbodyFile(),inbodyLine(),scopedContainer,this,inbodyDocumentation()+"\n",TRUE,FALSE,
3732 QCString(),FALSE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT));
3733 }
3734 }
3735
3736
3737 //printf("***** defArgList=%p name=%s docs=%s hasDocs=%d\n",
3738 // defArgList,
3739 // defArgList?defArgList->hasDocumentation():-1);
3740 const ArgumentList &docArgList = m_templateMaster ?
3741 m_templateMaster->argumentList() :
3742 m_defArgList;
3743 ol.generateDoc(
3744 docFile(),docLine(),
3745 scopedContainer,
3746 this, // memberDef
3747 inlineArgListToDoc(docArgList), // docStr
3748 TRUE, // indexWords
3749 FALSE, // isExample
3750 QCString(),FALSE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT)
3751 );
3752
3753 _writeEnumValues(ol,scopedContainer,cfname,ciname,cname);
3754 _writeReimplements(ol);
3755 _writeReimplementedBy(ol);
3756 _writeCategoryRelation(ol);
3757 _writeExamples(ol);
3758 _writeTypeConstraints(ol);
3759 writeSourceDef(ol,cname);
3760 writeInlineCode(ol,cname);
3761 if (hasReferencesRelation()) writeSourceRefs(ol,cname);
3762 if (hasReferencedByRelation()) writeSourceReffedBy(ol,cname);
3763 _writeCallGraph(ol);
3764 _writeCallerGraph(ol);
3765
3766 ol.endIndent();
3767
3768 // enable LaTeX again
3769 //if (Config_getBool(EXTRACT_ALL) && !hasDocs) ol.enable(OutputType::Latex);
3770 ol.popGeneratorState();
3771
3772 warnIfUndocumentedParams();
3773}

3810 QCString memAnchor = anchor();
3811 QCString cfname = getOutputFileBase();
3812 QCString cname;
3813 if (scope) cname = scope->name();
3814 if (doxyName.at(0)=='@')
3815 {
3816 doxyName="__unnamed__";
3817 }
3818
3819 ClassDef *cd = m_accessorClass;
3820 //printf("===> %s::anonymous: %s\n",qPrint(name()),cd?qPrint(cd->name()):"<none>");
3821
3822 if (container && container->definitionType()==Definition::TypeClass &&
3823 !(toClassDef(container))->isJavaEnum())
3824 {
3825 ol.startInlineMemberType();
3826 ol.startDoxyAnchor(cfname,cname,memAnchor,doxyName,doxyArgs);
3827
3828 QCString ts = fieldType();
3829
3830 if (cd) // cd points to an anonymous struct pointed to by this member
3831 // so we add a link to it from the type column.
3832 {
3833 int i=0;
3834 const char *prefixes[] = { "struct ","union ","class ", 0 };
3835 const char **p = prefixes;
3836 while (*p)
3837 {
3838 int l=qstrlen(*p);
3839 if (ts.left(l)==*p)
3840 {
3841 ol.writeString(*p);
3842 i=l;
3843 }
3844 p++;
3845 }
3846 ol.writeObjectLink(cd->getReference(),
3847 cd->getOutputFileBase(),
3848 cd->anchor(),ts.mid(i));
3849 }
3850 else // use standard auto linking
3851 {
3852 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol), // out
3853 scope, // scope
3854 getBodyDef(), // fileScope
3855 this, // self
3856 ts // text
3857 );
3858 }
3859 ol.endDoxyAnchor(cfname,memAnchor);
3860 ol.endInlineMemberType();
3861 }
3862
3863 ol.startInlineMemberName();
3864 ol.docify(doxyName);
3865 if (isVariable() && !argsString().isEmpty() && !isObjCMethod())
3866 {
3867 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),getOuterScope(),getBodyDef(),this,argsString());
3868 }
3869 if (!m_bitfields.isEmpty()) // add bitfields
3870 {
3871 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),getOuterScope(),getBodyDef(),this,m_bitfields);
3872 }
3873 if (hasOneLineInitializer() && !isDefine())
3874 {
3875 ol.writeString(" ");
3876 linkifyText(TextGeneratorOLImpl(ol),getOuterScope(),getBodyDef(),this,m_initializer.simplifyWhiteSpace());
3877 }
3878 ol.endInlineMemberName();
3879
3880 ol.startInlineMemberDoc();
3881
3882 QCString brief = briefDescription();
3883 QCString detailed = documentation();
3884
3885 /* write brief description */
3886 if (!brief.isEmpty())
3887 {
3888 ol.generateDoc(briefFile(),briefLine(),
3889 getOuterScope()?getOuterScope():container,this,
3890 brief,FALSE,FALSE,
3891 QCString(),TRUE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT));
3892 }
3893
3894 /* write detailed description */
3895 if (!detailed.isEmpty())
3896 {
3897 if (!brief.isEmpty())
3898 {
3899 ol.disable(OutputType::Html);
3900 ol.lineBreak();
3901 ol.enable(OutputType::Html);
3902 }
3903 ol.generateDoc(docFile(),docLine(),
3904 getOuterScope()?getOuterScope():container,this,
3905 detailed+"\n",FALSE,FALSE,
3906 QCString(),FALSE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT));
3907
3908 }
3909
3910 ol.endInlineMemberDoc();
3911}

4418{
4419 if (!isLinkableInProject()) return;
4420 tagFile << " <member kind=\"";
4421 switch (m_mtype)
4422 {
4423 case MemberType_Define: tagFile << "define"; break;
4424 case MemberType_EnumValue: tagFile << "enumvalue"; break;
4425 case MemberType_Property: tagFile << "property"; break;
4426 case MemberType_Event: tagFile << "event"; break;
4427 case MemberType_Variable: tagFile << "variable"; break;
4428 case MemberType_Typedef: tagFile << "typedef"; break;
4429 case MemberType_Enumeration: tagFile << "enumeration"; break;
4430 case MemberType_Function: tagFile << "function"; break;
4431 case MemberType_Signal: tagFile << "signal"; break;
4432 case MemberType_Friend: tagFile << "friend"; break;
4433 case MemberType_DCOP: tagFile << "dcop"; break;
4434 case MemberType_Slot: tagFile << "slot"; break;
4435 case MemberType_Interface: tagFile << "interface"; break;
4436 case MemberType_Service: tagFile << "service"; break;
4437 case MemberType_Sequence: tagFile << "sequence"; break;
4438 case MemberType_Dictionary: tagFile << "dictionary"; break;
4439 }
4440 if (m_prot!=Protection::Public)
4441 {
4442 tagFile << "\" protection=\"";
4443 if (m_prot==Protection::Protected) tagFile << "protected";
4444 else if (m_prot==Protection::Package) tagFile << "package";
4445 else /* Private */ tagFile << "private";
4446 }
4447 if (m_virt!=Specifier::Normal)
4448 {
4449 tagFile << "\" virtualness=\"";
4450 if (m_virt==Specifier::Virtual) tagFile << "virtual";
4451 else /* Pure */ tagFile << "pure";
4452 }
4453 if (isStatic())
4454 {
4455 tagFile << "\" static=\"yes";
4456 }
4457 tagFile << "\">\n";
4458 if (typeString()!=QCString("@"))
4459 {
4460 tagFile << " <type>" << convertToXML(typeString()) << "</type>\n";
4461 }
4462 QCString fn = getOutputFileBase();
4463 addHtmlExtensionIfMissing(fn);
4464 tagFile << " <name>" << convertToXML(useQualifiedName ? qualifiedName() : name()) << "</name>\n";
4465 tagFile << " <anchorfile>" << convertToXML(fn) << "</anchorfile>\n";
4466 tagFile << " <anchor>" << convertToXML(anchor()) << "</anchor>\n";
4467 QCString idStr = id();
4468 if (!idStr.isEmpty())
4469 {
4470 tagFile << " <clangid>" << convertToXML(idStr) << "</clangid>\n";
4471 }
4472 tagFile << " <arglist>" << convertToXML(argsString()) << "</arglist>\n";
4473 if (isStrong())
4474 {
4475 for (const auto &fmd : m_enumFields)
4476 {
4477 if (!fmd->isReference())
4478 {
4479 tagFile << " <enumvalue file=\"" << convertToXML(fn);
4480 tagFile << "\" anchor=\"" << convertToXML(fmd->anchor());

4488 }
4489 }
4490 writeDocAnchorsToTagFile(tagFile);
